narrative:
Scipio Township has 771 registered voters, with 51.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.9 percentage points.
